ORDER GRANTING PETITIONER'S MOTION TO FILE UNDER SEAL PORTIONS OF PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONERS SYNOPSYS, INC. AND VIRAGE LOGIC CORPORATION'S MOTION TO FILE UNDER SEAL PORTIONS OF PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. RESPONDENT FILED A STATEMENT OF NON-OPPOSITION AND THE MOTION COMPLIES WITH THE APPLICABLE RULES OF COURT. THE COURT SIGNED THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED BY THE MOVING PARTY. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONERS SYNOPSYS, INC. AND VIRAGE LOGIC CORPORATION'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED IN LARGE PART. THE ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONFIRMED AND PETITIONERS ARE AWARDED $7500 AS REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES. RESPONDENT DOES NOT OPPOSE CONFIRMATION OF THE AWARD. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To File Under Seal Portions Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS SYNOPSYS, INC. AND VIRAGE LOGIC CORPORATION'S Motion To File Under Seal Portions Of Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is Granted. Respondent filed a statement of non-opposition and the motion complies with the applicable rules of court. The court signed the proposed order submitted by the moving party. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

Ntc Of Hearing Re Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS SYNOPSYS, INC. AND VIRAGE LOGIC CORPORATION's Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is Granted in large part. The arbitration award is confirmed and petitioners are awarded $7500 as reasonable attorney's fees. Respondent does not oppose confirmation of the award. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
